---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## System

Which system is this for?

- [ ] Carrier Management
- [ ] New System (describe below)
- [ ] Shared (packages, infrastructure)

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What workflow is painful today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible — screens, interactions, data model changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
